name: EDINET v2 API (Japan FSA)
description: Japanese TSE-listed airport operators' financial filings. Covers Narita, Kansai, and other Japanese airport operators.
registration_notes: Free key from EDINET developer portal at disclosure2.edinet-fsa.go.jp. Registration page in Japanese. MFA required. Disable popup blocking before registering — the key display screen requires a redirect. Video walkthrough: https://youtu.be/2ao-CZS-BtQ?t=63
notes: Module scaffolded. Ingestor activates once EDINET_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY is set in .env. Not blocking Week 1-2 work.
